notes_md:
**Bá đạo** means *extremely dominant* or *so good it overwhelms others*. It’s stronger and more playful than just “giỏi” (good).

It describes a person, team, skill, product, or performance that totally outclasses the rest. It often has a fun, exaggerated tone — sometimes even slightly dramatic.

In slang, it can also mean *overpowered* or *ridiculously impressive*, especially in games, sports, or online talk.

Close vibe: **vô đối** (unbeatable). Opposite feeling: **yếu**, **tầm thường**.
notes:
Bá đạo means extremely dominant or so good it overwhelms others. It’s stronger and more playful than just “giỏi” (good).

It describes a person, team, skill, product, or performance that totally outclasses the rest. It often has a fun, exaggerated tone — sometimes even slightly dramatic.

In slang, it can also mean overpowered or ridiculously impressive, especially in games, sports, or online talk.

Close vibe: vô đối (unbeatable). Opposite feeling: yếu, tầm thường.
exampleSentences: Đội bóng này thật sự quá bá đạo ở giải đấu năm nay.
Anh trai em chơi game rất bá đạo, ai cũng phải nể.
Cửa hàng này có dịch vụ bá đạo nên khách rất đông.
exampleSentencesTranslated: This football team is really dominant in the tournament this year.
My older brother is dominant at gaming, everyone respects him.
This shop is dominant in service so it has many customers.
